summary: #9865 remains the open canonical tracker for Batch API support for background agent turns. #49326, #56126, and #70606 are already closed duplicate context, so no close/comment/merge/fix mutation is planned. No autonomous fix artifact is emitted because the requested implementation is a broad product/API feature spanning provider/runtime contracts, protocol/config surfaces, provider plugins, delivery/accounting/fallback behavior, docs, and tests.

actions.reason: Best surviving open tracker for the shared Batch API/background-task feature request; keep open for maintainer-led design and implementation.
